metadata.name: Dhrishtadyumna
metadata.primary_role: Commander-in-chief of the Pandava army / Born from fire to kill Drona / Twin brother of Draupadi
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Panchala kingdom, born from sacred fire alongside Draupadi)
metadata.divine_origin: Born from the sacred fire specifically destined to kill Dronacharya — his destiny was written at birth

timelines.context_description: Dhrishtadyumna, born destined to kill Drona, serves as the supreme commander of the Pandava army at Kurukshetra.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Bronze-copper complexion with a reddish-fire glow similar to Draupadi's fire-born quality, fierce and intense
physical_appearance.height: Tall and imposing military bearing, broad-shouldered, the posture of a born commander
physical_appearance.build: Powerful military build — trained for war since birth (literally created for war), compact dense musculature of a professional soldier, efficient and deadly
physical_appearance.facial_features: Fierce determined face resembling Draupadi but masculine — sharp features, intense eyes of one born for a single purpose (killing Drona), strong jaw, permanent focused expression of military readiness
physical_appearance.hair: Short practical military-cropped hair, no-nonsense warrior style
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: His destiny is his mark — everyone knows he was born to kill Drona, including Drona himself who trained him anyway, this cosmic irony hangs over every interaction between teacher and destined-killer

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Practical Pandava military armor — efficient and functional rather than ornate, designed for command mobility, battle cape for identification on the field
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Commander's insignia, military chain of command markers, practical war gear
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A straight military sword, a shield, a bow — efficient weapons for a commander who needs to fight and direct simultaneously

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Direct, military, efficient — the voice of professional warfare, no philosophizing, pure tactical clarity
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Strong commanding baritone — born for battlefield orders, cuts through noise, efficient and direct
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Short tactical commands, military directives, professional and efficient, addresses strategy rather than philosophy
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Professional military focus, the burden of a destined purpose, the irony of killing one's own teacher

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Commanding cinematic shot of Dhrishtadyumna, age 35, commander of the Pandava army. Bronze-copper complexion with fire-born glow. Fierce determined face, practical military bearing. Wearing efficient Pandava military armor, battle cape. Standing on a command chariot directing the army, pointing with a sword. Vast battlefield panorama below. 3D Pixar style, military dramatic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A strong, commanding military baritone. Born for battlefield orders. Direct and efficient. Age approximately 35 years.
